name: Scout Mono
explanation: A semi-modular monosynth with sample & hold in the Roland System-100 lineage. Two oscillators (saw plus square) run through a resonant low-pass with its own envelope, and the signature patch is a noise sample & hold: it steps a new random value at S&H Rate and holds it, modulating the filter cutoff (and a touch of pitch) by S&H Depth for the burbling, sci-fi 'random step' movement that keeps a held note alive. Mono, last-note priority. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, S&H Rate, S&H Depth, Env Amount and Level.
